Users must connect their device and enter a PIN, ensuring that only the device owner can access the wallet 💯[((1➾888﹤633﹥4176))] and approve transactions securely. ❓ . Can I access my Ledger account from any device? You can access it from different devices, 💯[((1➾888﹤633﹥4176))] but you must have your Ledger hardware wallet with you.
